# Suggested GitHub Repository Topics

Add these topics in GitHub repo Settings → General → Topics for discoverability:

```
gnn
graph-neural-networks
structural-health-monitoring
cfrp
aerospace
jaxa
abaqus
pytorch-geometric
deep-learning
defect-detection
debonding
composite-materials
finite-element-method
```

Copy-paste friendly (comma-separated):
gnn, graph-neural-networks, structural-health-monitoring, cfrp, aerospace, jaxa, abaqus, pytorch-geometric, deep-learning, defect-detection, debonding, composite-materials, finite-element-method
